title: Add support for parsing the SystemVerilog 'bind' construct

features.name: basic bind directive
features.description: Code should include a basic bind directive that attaches a module instance to a target module

features.name: bind with instance list using colon separator
features.description: Code should include a bind directive with an instance list introduced by a colon, specifying multiple target instances
features.snippet: bind foo : foo0, foo1 bar bound_i (.*);

features.name: bind with multiple comma-separated bound instances
features.description: Code should include a bind directive with multiple comma-separated bound module instances in a single directive

features.name: bind with hierarchical target reference starting at $root
features.description: Code should include a bind directive with a hierarchical target reference starting from $root

features.name: bind with parameter override on bound module
features.description: Code should include a bind directive with a parameter override on the bound module using parameter mapping syntax

features.name: bind at top-level scope with dot-separated hierarchical instance path
features.description: Code should include a bind directive at top-level scope using a dot-separated hierarchical instance path as target
